comments:
Layer content types for all layer variants.

Each LayerType in Layer.purs has a corresponding content type here.
This allows fully-typed layers where the content is specific to the
layer's purpose.

## Architecture

LayerContent is a sum type with one constructor per LayerType.
Combined with LayerBase, this gives complete layer representation:

```purescript
type Layer = { base :: LayerBase, content :: LayerContent }
```

## Content Categories

- **Media**: ImageContent, VideoContent, AudioContent, SolidContent
- **Content**: TextContent, ShapeContent, NullContent
- **3D**: CameraContent, LightContent
- **Effects**: AdjustmentContent, EffectContent
- **Composition**: PreCompContent, GroupContent, NestedCompContent
- **Specialized**: ParticleContent, DepthContent, GeneratedContent, etc.

## Architecture Note

This module exceeds the standard 500-line limit due to schema coherence.
The LayerContent sum type (26 constructors) requires all associated content
types to be co-located. The `contentToLayerType` mapping between LayerContent
and LayerType would be impossible to maintain across multiple files.

declarations.comments:
Content payload for each layer type.

This sum type pairs with LayerBase to create fully-typed layers.
Each constructor corresponds to a LayerType variant.
declarations.title: LayerContent

declarations.comments: Get the LayerType for a LayerContent.
declarations.title: contentToLayerType

declarations.comments: Check if content is media type.
declarations.title: isContentMedia

declarations.comments: Check if two layer contents are the same type (but not necessarily equal).
declarations.title: sameContentType

declarations.comments: Check if two layer contents are different types.
declarations.title: differentContentType

declarations.comments: Check if image content has valid dimensions (both width and height >= 1).
declarations.title: isValidImageDimensions

declarations.comments: Check if video content has valid parameters.
declarations.title: isValidVideoContent

declarations.comments: Check if solid content has valid color values.
declarations.title: isValidSolidColor

declarations.comments: Check if generated content has reasonable inference parameters.
declarations.title: isValidGeneratedParams

declarations.comments:
Content for shape layers.

Shapes are defined as paths with fill/stroke styling.
declarations.title: ShapeContent

declarations.comments:
Content for pre-composition layers.

A precomp is a collapsed composition that renders as a single layer.
declarations.title: PreCompContent

declarations.comments:
Content for nested composition references.

Unlike PreComp, nested comp maintains live link to source composition.
declarations.title: NestedCompContent

declarations.comments:
Content for AI-generated layers.

This is the primary integration point for diffusion models.
Supports image generation, video generation, and motion control.
declarations.title: GeneratedContent

declarations.comments:
Reference to an asset in the project.

Assets are files (images, videos, audio) imported into the project.
The path can be relative (to project) or absolute (external).
declarations.title: AssetRef
